title: Simple Structures: Nostalgia
body:
This modification adds the classic buildings of the novice players from the first versions.

Strictly speaking, this is part of another project, but I decided to share these materials.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
![structures from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f93cdd516b0e6dc158167555644809d5d4cdd38.jpeg)

### [All projects are Simple Structures](https://modrinth.com/collection/vinouI3O)

_______________________________________________________________________________________________
### **Integration:**

- Terralith
- Biomes O' Plenty
